name: aurora-empty-state
title: Aurora Empty State
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Centered empty state with icon slot, heading, description, and optional CTA button.
docs:
Aurora component that expects `aurora-tokens` to be installed first.

Default install target: `@ui/aurora/empty-state.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-button`, `aurora-input`.
